name: Unusual SSH Activity Detected
description: Unusually high SSH activity has been detected, which could indicate data exfiltration, a brute-force attempt, or a command and control connection.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the start of the aggregation window.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account involved in the SSH connections.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address of the SSH connections.

parameters.name: destination_address
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the SSH connections.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The number of SSH connections detected within the timeframe.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The status of the SSH connection (e.g., 'success', 'failed').
